## SortDropdown class

The `SortDropdown` component allows user to select the search results order. This component also allows to change the selected sort programmatically.

<b>Signature:</b>

```typescript
export default class SortDropdown extends SortDropdown_base 
```
<b>Extends:</b> SortDropdown\_base

## Remarks

It extends [SortMixin](./x-components.sortmixin.md)<!-- -->.

## Properties

|  Property | Modifiers | Type | Description |
|  --- | --- | --- | --- |
|  [animation?](./x-components.sortdropdown.animation.md) |  | string \| typeof Vue | <i>(Optional)</i> The transition to use for opening and closing the dropdown. |
